name: Capital MBS
description_short: Capital MBS is a credit repair provider based in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. Rated 5.0/5 with 72 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Capital MBS is a credit repair provider serving clients in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. Carrying a 5.0/5.0 Google rating from 72 reviews, Capital MBS has an exceptional reputation among consumers in the Philadelphia area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Capital MBS specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Philadelphia, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Capital MBS operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Philadelphia, Pennsylvania area who are considering Capital MBS should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.
